holdings.infoBox: DDXX is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Defined Duration 20 ETF (DDXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks long-term capital growth through a time-weighted portfolio of stocks. Investments include broad-based, factor-based, or style-based global ETFs of any market capitalization. DDXX was launched on Nov 13, 2025 and is issued by Discipline Funds.
